title: Return My HUD!
description: This resource pack restores Minecraft's default HUD when a pack inadvertently alters it. Respackopts support!
body:
![Return My HUD! Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e983dc3c8e41c8b3e6cb581e5f0b75cadf789aec.png)

This resource pack reverses any changes made by HUD-modifying resource packs by using Mojang's default textures.

Respackopts Support! ![Respackopt Support Evidence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0ca777ed395373dc5aa12a54c609e3561bb84d2.png) ## Showcase ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83941bce4897dc7f8c93c83de5895c31d9597c1c.png) ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1482e081cab4ed2ea00c516a6c403e3b4b58afed.png) ![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91750eade609be17d63cfa8148a5e17e7d262158.png)
## **Coverage** - Armor Bar - Hearts - Hunger Bar - Bubble Bar - Experience Bar - Locator Bar - Hotbar - Offhand Slot - Boss Bar ## **Instructions** - Download - Add it to your resource packs - Put it OVER the resource pack that changes the HUD ![Return My HUD! order example.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d7ac26985a635bb426b66ba9a3eeff04d4ea2d7.png) - Click done and enjoy! None of the textures used here is mine. They are owned by Mojang and Microsoft. I got the mcmeta file code from Vanilla Tweaks! Go check them out: [https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
LICENCE All rights reserved. You may use this resource pack for personal or public use, but **please credit me if you share it.** That includes videos, modifications, and general publicity. If you enjoy this, please spread it around so others can enjoy it too! _(Not required)_
